_doc: M1 CIM tile (Phase 1). Quad-core, 512x512/core (ISSCC 2024). G_eff(N,K) 2D throughput (GOP/s, INT8) fit on native single-tile pts (K*N<=4.19M). n_cores free.
_prefill_doc: prefill (M>1): tile_lat(M)=a+b*M fit on full 2048x2048 tiles at M in {64,128,256}; GEMM = (K*N/W^2)*tile_lat (fractional area, not ceil). M>256 / partial-width tiles extrapolated (CimTileModel.prefill_extrapolated).

decode_card_revalidation.note: median |rel_diff| over the alpha13 pts (computed here; matches validate_cim_card). <= 0.10 -> the Alpha-calibrated G_eff is Card-confirmed, freeze lifted, params unchanged.

prefill_M_decode_anchor.note: measured decode (M=1) tile on its measured basis; NOT in the prefill fit (different regime: direct single-column compile, modeled by G_eff)
